messages.content: Hey! I'm your test-automation orchestrator. Tell me what you want and I'll do the legwork — e.g. *"generate tests for Account"*, *"run a sanity suite on Contact"*, or *"what apps/objects are available?"*. Want me to list what's in the connected platform to get started?
test list view in end ot end

I can run an end-to-end list-view test, but a list view belongs to a specific object — and I won't guess object names. Which one do you want?

Apps available: **Core, CRM, HR, LIMS, Ops Hub**.

Tell me an app (e.g. *"CRM"*) and I'll list its objects, or name the object directly (e.g. *"list view for Account"*) and I'll get going: describe it → generate cases → generate the grounded Playwright script → run the suite → pull evidence.

There's no **admin** app on this platform — `list_objects` for it came back empty. Valid apps are: **core, crm, hr, lims, ops_hub**.

Pick one and I'll list its objects, or name the object directly (e.g. *"list view for Account in crm"*) and I'll run the full end-to-end: describe → generate cases → grounded Playwright script → run suite → pull evidence.
